checks.reason: H013/H055 already proved clearing SDXC_ACCESS_BY_AHB and using DMA access mode still leaves IDST=0x4000 with CHDA=DLBA, CBDA=0, CBCR=0x400, and BBCR=0.
Vendor BSP writes FIX_BURST|IDMA_ON, and H045/H073 already recorded this as matching a tested path. No new burst-control register was found for SMHC0.
Full BSP has sunxi_mmc_smhc_ecc_enable(), but H048 already showed SDMMC0 vendor DTS lacks b2c-ecc-on, cqe-on, and cqe-ecc-on. This is gated off and not normal IDMAC descriptor fetch.
H060 already found EMCE scaffolding but no active assigned hook for ordinary SDMMC0 reads.
The datasheet says SPC sets secure peripheral areas and TZMA sets secure SRAM areas, but no SMHC0/storage-master register, offset, or Linux-applicable handoff bit was found.

hermes_agent.note: Queued independent bounded audit for source-backed non-closed IDMAC descriptor-fetch leads. RTX 3090 route remains disabled.

next: Wait for maintainer/vendor response or Hermes independent audit. Only patch if a new source-backed A733 SDMMC0 normal-IDMAC descriptor-fetch precondition appears.
